flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Michigan-Dearborn rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.0k → $32.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Michigan-Dearborn rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.8k → $15.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Michigan-Dearborn fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Michigan-Dearborn are 10% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($59.6k vs $54.1k).
